sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63547" key="lipopwgwni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐπο-πωγωνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n63547.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">want of beard</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0433.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crates Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
